Appearances:
Plaintiff Amdrew Alabanza is present and appearing in Pro Per.
Defendant Todd Prestenback is present.
Attorney Renju Jacob representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
